message:
feat: add EventDeduplicator + NotificationCooldown to events module

EventDeduplicator: collapses repeated identical events within a
configurable time window, tracking occurrence count, first_seen, and
last_seen timestamps. Returns New or Duplicate{suppressed_count} verdict.

NotificationCooldown: prevents repeated notifications for the same event
key within a cooldown period. When cooldown expires, reports how many
were suppressed since the last notification so operators see aggregated
counts instead of spam.

Both use bounded capacity with FIFO eviction and configurable parameters.

17 unit tests covering:
- First/duplicate/expired occurrence handling
- Counter increments and suppressed count queries
- Independent keys, capacity eviction, timestamp tracking
- Cooldown expiry with suppressed count carry-forward
- Clear/reset behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
